## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? A short, clear description. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 — or "N/A" if there isn't one. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New export format / notation / DSL node kind (registry addition)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / tooling / chore

## Testing done

<!-- How did you verify this change? Commands run, platforms tested, notations
     checked, sample .ink documents used, before/after screenshots, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` is clean
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` is clean
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change (new behavior in `packages/core` is unit-tested)
- [ ] Updated documentation where relevant (`README.md`, `SPEC.md`, `docs/DSL.md`)
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
